hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_desc: Spell out loud: the alphabet, How do you spell...?, double letters and email addresses -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- The Alphabet of Healthcare: Spelling Out Loud
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 5 -- The Alphabet of Healthcare

listenings.text: Hi Graziele, this is Doctor Bennett. I am a new doctor in the team. Please add my name to the calendar. My surname is Bennett. That is B. E. N. N. E. T. T. Double N, and double T. My email address is bennett at hospital dot com. Thank you very much.

Hello, this is the reception desk. Doctor Lee is in the radiology department. Her surname is Lee. That is L. E. E. Double E. Her email address is lee at hospital dot com. Please write the name with two letters E. Thank you.

extra_audio.text: A new doctor calls the hospital. Graziele asks how to spell his surname. The doctor spells it letter by letter. Graziele writes his email address. She confirms the doctor's name in the calendar.
